mapper.sql: id, user_id, dept_id, biz_dept_id, category_id, status_id, title, content, image_urls, start_time, end_time, duration_minutes, is_important, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM work_record
ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM work_record WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_record ( user_id, dept_id, biz_dept_id, category_id, status_id, title, content, image_urls, start_time, end_time, duration_minutes, is_important, deleted ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{deptId}, #{bizDeptId}, #{categoryId}, #{statusId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{imageUrls}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{durationMinutes}, #{isImportant}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE work_record
biz_dept_id = #{bizDeptId}, category_id = #{categoryId}, status_id = #{statusId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, image_urls = #{imageUrls}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, is_important = #{isImportant},
WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE work_record SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
